instruction: During the specified time range of May 23, 2020, from 00:00 to 00:30, the system experienced a failure. The root cause component, the exact root cause occurrence time, and the underlying reason are currently unknown. You are tasked with identifying the root cause component, the root cause occurrence datetime, and the root cause reason.
scoring_points: The only root cause occurrence time is within 1 minutes (i.e., <=1min) of 2020-05-23 00:05:00
